features.name: Scaffold packages/market-research/src/api/mcp-server.ts with McpServer boilerplate (do NOT modify existing src/mcp/server.ts)
Implement market_research_is_ready — GET /health, returns {ready, port, timestamp}
Port existing 6 tools from src/mcp/server.ts with market_research_ prefix
Implement market_research_niche_pipeline — full single-niche collection across all platforms
Implement market_research_full_multi_niche — runs niche_pipeline for array of niches
Implement market_research_all_platforms — cross-platform search for single keyword
Implement market_research_ingest — stores raw research result into Supabase
Implement market_research_get_stored — query stored research by niche/platform/date
Set 60s timeout on all long-running research calls
Structured error handling: SERVICE_DOWN, RATE_LIMITED, TIMEOUT codes
Register server on stdio transport + export for MCP client consumption
Add to packages/market-research/package.json: mcp-server entrypoint script
